Klasse Vendor

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes.Vendor
public class Vendor extends Object
Represents a vendor with contact details and supplied articles.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Vendor(String name, String contactPerson, String phoneNumber, String email, String address)
    Creates a vendor with an empty supplied-articles list.
    Vendor(String name, String contactPerson, String phoneNumber, String email, String address, double minOrderValue)
    Creates a vendor with minimum order value and no supplied-articles list.
    Vendor(String name, String contactPerson, String phoneNumber, String email, String address, List<String> suppliedArticles, double minOrderValue)
    Creates a vendor with supplied articles and minimum order value.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Vendor

      public Vendor(String name, String contactPerson, String phoneNumber, String email, String address, List<String> suppliedArticles, double minOrderValue)
      Creates a vendor with supplied articles and minimum order value.
      Parameter:
      name - vendor name
      contactPerson - primary contact person
      phoneNumber - contact phone number
      email - contact email address
      address - mailing or physical address
      suppliedArticles - list of supplied article numbers
      minOrderValue - minimum order value

    • Vendor

      public Vendor(String name, String contactPerson, String phoneNumber, String email, String address, double minOrderValue)
      Creates a vendor with minimum order value and no supplied-articles list.
      Parameter:
      name - vendor name
      contactPerson - primary contact person
      phoneNumber - contact phone number
      email - contact email address
      address - mailing or physical address
      minOrderValue - minimum order value

    • Vendor

      public Vendor(String name, String contactPerson, String phoneNumber, String email, String address)
      Creates a vendor with an empty supplied-articles list.
      Parameter:
      name - vendor name
      contactPerson - primary contact person
      phoneNumber - contact phone number
      email - contact email address
      address - mailing or physical address
